required_behavior: Dispatch Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet id 0x10 to the existing DeclareCommands decoder so the official root-only ClientboundCommandsPacket body 01000000 decodes, preserves one root node and root index 0, and consumes the full body.
forbidden: Do not edit oracle answers or expected bytes.
Do not read official jars or decompiled official sources while applying the Rust fix.
Do not broaden the change beyond the allowed_write_scope.
Do not implement literal/argument command-tree semantics beyond what the existing decoder already supports.
stop_boundary: This fix is only for Play clientbound minecraft:commands / 0x10 root-only packet dispatch/decode. It does not prove literal/argument node payloads, redirects, custom suggestions, restricted flags, Brigadier command semantics, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
